headline: Wells Fargo Lifts DTE Energy (DTE) Price Target by $5. Here is Why
summary: DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) is a Detroit-based diversified energy company involved in the development and management of energy-related businesses and services nationwide. On June 15, Wells Fargo lifted its price target on DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE) from $160 […]
